title: Lesson 1: F & J
text: fjfj jfjf fjjf jffj fjfj jfjf fjjf jffj fjfj jfjf
description: Place your index fingers on F and J. Feel the bumps.

title: Lesson 2: D & K
text: dkdk kdkd dkkd dkdk kdkd dkkd dkdk kdkd dkkd dkdk
description: Use your middle fingers for D (left) and K (right).

title: Lesson 3: S & L
text: slsl lsls slls slsl lsls slls slsl lsls slls slsl
description: Ring fingers on S (left) and L (right).

title: Lesson 4: A & ;
text: a;a; ;a;a a;;a a;a; ;a;a a;;a a;a; ;a;a a;;a a;a;
description: Pinky fingers on A (left) and semicolon (right).

title: Lesson 5: Full Home Row
text: asdfjkl; asdf jkl; fjdk slaj asdfjkl; jkl; asdf fjdk
description: All home row keys. Keep fingers on the home position.

title: Lesson 6: Home Row Words
text: a dad fall flask lads ask flak jab jak fall dad lads
description: Real words using only home row keys.

title: Lesson 7: Home Row Sentences
text: a sad lass had a flask; a lad had a fall; ask dad
description: Short sentences with home row only. Include the semicolons.

title: Lesson 8: E & I
text: ejej eded eiej eded ieie eiei jeje dede edie idle
description: E uses left middle finger. I uses right middle finger.

title: Lesson 9: R & U
text: ruru urur ruur ruru urur ruur ruru urur ruur ruru
description: R uses left index. U uses right index finger.

title: Lesson 10: T & Y
text: tyty ytyt tyyt tyty ytyt tyyt tyty ytyt tyyt tyty
description: T and Y both use index fingers. Reach up from home row.

title: Lesson 11: W & O
text: wowo owow woo wowo owow wowo owow owow woo wow owl
description: W uses left ring. O uses right ring finger.

title: Lesson 12: Q & P
text: qpqp pqpq qppq qpqp pqpq qppq qpqp pqpq qppq qpqp
description: Q uses left pinky. P uses right pinky.

title: Lesson 13: Top Row Words
text: tree quit rope power sword quite tower wrote power
description: Mix of home and top row keys. Focus on accuracy.

title: Lesson 14: Top Row Sentences
text: the quick fox saw two quiet pigs rest at our door
description: Sentences combining home and top row keys.

title: Lesson 15: V & M
text: vmvm mvmv vmmv vmvm mvmv vmmv vmvm mvmv vmmv vmvm
description: V uses left index. M uses right index finger.

title: Lesson 16: B & N
text: bnbn nbnb bnnb bnbn nbnb bnnb bnbn nbnb bnnb bnbn
description: B and N both use index fingers. Reach down from home.

title: Lesson 17: C & comma
text: c
column26: C uses left middle. Comma uses right middle finger.

title: Lesson 18: X & period
text: x.x. .x.x x..x x.x. .x.x x..x x.x. .x.x x..x x.x.
description: X uses left ring. Period uses right ring finger.

title: Lesson 19: Z & slash
text: z/z/ /z/z z//z z/z/ /z/z z//z z/z/ /z/z z//z z/z/
description: Z uses left pinky. Slash uses right pinky.

title: Lesson 20: Bottom Row Words
text: cave zone vibe bomb next cave zone vibe bomb next
description: Words using bottom row keys mixed with home row.

title: Lesson 21: Full Keyboard
text: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
description: The classic pangram. Uses every letter in the alphabet.

title: Lesson 22: 1 & 2
description: Number row — left side. Pinky and ring finger.

title: Lesson 23: 3 & 4
description: Number row — middle left. Middle and index finger.

title: Lesson 24: 5 & 6
description: 5 and 6 use index fingers. The center of the number row.

title: Lesson 25: 7 & 8
description: Number row — middle right. Index and middle finger.

title: Lesson 26: 9 & 0
description: Number row — right side. Ring and pinky finger.

title: Lesson 27: Numbers in context
text: call 911 or text 555-1234 the address is 42 main st
description: Numbers mixed with words. Common real-world patterns.

title: Lesson 28: Common symbols
text: price: $19.99 score: 100% email: user@test.com #tag
description: Common symbols used in everyday typing.

title: Lesson 29: Short Words
text: the and for are but not you all can her was one
description: High-frequency short words. Focus on rhythm not speed.

title: Lesson 30: Common Bigrams
text: th he in en re er on at es te an or st nt nd
description: Common letter pairs. Smooth transitions between keys.

title: Lesson 31: Medium Words
text: about after again before could every first found going
description: Medium-length words at natural typing speed.

title: Lesson 32: Long Words
text: information government environment understand development
description: Longer words. Stay relaxed and maintain accuracy.

title: Lesson 33: Full Sentences
text: practice makes perfect when you type with all fingers
description: Full sentences. Aim for smooth consistent rhythm.

title: Lesson 34: Paragraphs
text: touch typing is a method of typing using all fingers without looking at the keyboard
description: First paragraph practice. Keep your eyes on the screen.

title: Lesson 35: Speed Run
text: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog five times
description: Classic pangram repeated. Push for speed now that you know the keys.
